WARNING: Survivorship bias: universe is built from current-snapshot ticker 
lists. Stocks that delisted, went bankrupt, or were acquired before today are 
excluded entirely — results are biased upward by an unknown amount (typically 
1-3%/yr for large-cap windows, more for small-cap or longer windows).
WARNING: Skipped 51 potential entries due to earnings within ±3 days.
